name: Hyperengage (Actions)
description: Hyperengage actions destination, to connect your product usage data from Segment to Hyperengage

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Your Hyperengage API key located in the Integration Settings page.

workspaceIdentifier.label: Workspace Identifier
workspaceIdentifier.description: Your Hyperengage workspace identifier located in the Integration Settings page.

user_id.label: User ID
user_id.description: The External ID of the user

first_name.label: First name
first_name.description: The user's first name. This field is mandatory if you're not providing a name field

last_name.label: Last name
last_name.description: The user's last name. This field is mandatory if you're not providing a name field

account_id.label: Account id
account_id.description: The account id, to uniquely identify the account associated with the user

created_at.label: Created at
created_at.description: The timestamp when the user was created, represented in the ISO-8601 date format. For instance, "2023-09-26T15:30:00Z".

traits.label: Traits
traits.description: Properties to associate with the user

doc_search.label: Document Search
doc_search.description: The search query of the document.

doc_title.label: Page Title
doc_title.description: The title of the page where the event occurred.

url.label: URL
url.description: The URL of the page where the event occurred.

referer.label: Referrer
referer.description: The referrer of the page where the event occurred.

user_agent.label: User Agent
user_agent.description: The user agent of the browser.

utc_time.label: UTC Time
utc_time.description: The time of the event in UTC.

source_ip.label: IP Address
source_ip.description: The IP address of the user.

account_id.label: Account id
account_id.description: The External ID of the account to send properties for

user_id.label: User ID
user_id.description: The ID associated with the user

created_at.label: Account created at
created_at.description: The timestamp when the account was created, represented in the ISO-8601 date format. For instance, "2023-09-26T15:30:00Z".

plan.label: Account subscription plan
plan.description: Subscription plan the account is associated with
